tasks.subject: Task 1: Add doDeviceOp + doDeviceRead helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two method receivers on `*Handler` that consolidate the dial+ctx+op scaffolding, plus three lock-release tests proving they don't leak the per-device UDP mutex.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/server.go
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/server_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestDoDeviceOp|TestDoDeviceRead' -v -race && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/server.go", "cmd/breezyd/server_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestDoDeviceOp|TestDoDeviceRead' -v -race && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["doDeviceOp returns dial err or op err", "doDeviceRead analogous with h.dial", "lock released on success and on error", "just check + race clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Migrate /v1/* JSON handlers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Migrate every device-dialing handler in handlers_device.go and handlers_service.go to use doDeviceOp / doDeviceRead. JSON envelope responses unchanged. 12 handlers total.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/handlers_device.go
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/handlers_service.go

**Verify:** `just check && go test -race ./cmd/breezyd/ && grep -n 'h\.dialRecording\|context\.WithTimeout(r\.Context()' cmd/breezyd/handlers_device.go cmd/breezyd/handlers_service.go` (last grep should be empty)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/handlers_device.go", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_service.go"], "verifyCommand": "just check && go test -race ./cmd/breezyd/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["12 handlers migrated", "no h.dialRecording in these files", "no inline context.WithTimeout in these files", "existing tests pass unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Migrate /ui/* SSE handlers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Migrate every device-dialing handler in handlers_ui_write.go to use doDeviceOp. SSE response shapes unchanged. 9 handlers total.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go

**Verify:** `just check && go test -race ./cmd/breezyd/ && grep -n 'h\.dialRecording\|context\.WithTimeout(r\.Context()' cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go` (last grep should be empty)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go"], "verifyCommand": "just check && go test -race ./cmd/breezyd/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["9 handlers migrated", "no h.dialRecording in handlers_ui_write.go", "no inline context.WithTimeout in handlers_ui_write.go", "existing tests pass unchanged including fakePushHub assertions"]}
```
